seo.title: Painting Contractor Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your painting business. Route unhappy customers to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Painting Contractors
hero.subheading: A smooth finish looks obvious in person and forgettable online. ReviewFlo sends the ask right after walk-through when the color still feels fresh.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Painting Contractor Faces

items.heading: Great prep disappears once furniture is back
items.body: Homeowners stop noticing clean lines the moment the room feels normal again.

items.heading: Touch-up disputes blow up after you have left
items.body: Lighting changes and missed spots become one-star stories days later.

items.heading: Crews roll to the next job without a desk moment
items.body: Nobody closes with a review reminder when the ladder is already packed.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Painting Contractors

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after walk-through
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link when the job is signed off.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they send feedback to you privately.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Ask after the final look
items.body: Send when they approve the finish, not a week later when memory fades.

items.heading: Private first for drips and color mismatch
items.body: Comebacks get handled before public stars.

items.heading: Interior and exterior crews
items.body: Same link for residential repaints and exterior teams.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.a: Yes, especially after big color changes and exterior jobs that boosted curb appeal.
Private feedback opens a thread before frustration hits Google.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same routing for happy versus unhappy clients at contractor-friendly pricing.
Send to the person who signed off on the work.
One company link keeps messaging consistent.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Painting Contractor Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first review request goes out in under 5 minutes.
